iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 60% (up). Day 23 Hour 01 UTC - IMMINENT. Natanz struck. Arad/Dimona hit by Iranian missiles - 64 hospitalized in Arad, 10+ buildings damaged. First intercept failure near Dimona nuclear site. IAEA: no radiation. Iran fired 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia (2,500mi). Israel army chief: 'war not close to ending'. Updated 2026-03-22T01:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 23 Hour 01 UTC - IMMINENT. Sustained IRGC attacks on Gulf states (70th wave confirmed). Bahrain: 143 missiles + 242 drones intercepted since Feb 28. Saudi: 47 drones intercepted in single night. Kuwait refinery (Mina al-Ahmadi, 730k bpd) burning. Trump 48hr ultimatum active (deadline ~00:53 CET Mar 24). No diplomatic signals. Updated 2026-03-22T01:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: IRGC claims strikes on Kuwait and UAE air bases - ballistic missiles + suicide drones
latest_news.text: IRGC Navy commander Tangsiri claims 'pounded' Al-Minhad (UAE) and Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait) air bases with massive ballistic missile + suicide drone barrage. Says bases were 'origin of aggression' against Iran. UAE air defenses actively responding.

latest_news.headline: UAE air defenses responding to active missile threat
latest_news.text: UAE National Emergency Crisis and Disaster Management Authority confirms air defenses responding to missile threat. Tells residents to remain in safe locations. Direct threat to UAE territory escalates.

latest_news.headline: Putin tells Iran Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner'
latest_news.text: Putin's Nowruz message to new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and President Pezeshkian: Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner to Tehran during this difficult time.' Major geopolitical alignment signal.

latest_news.headline: UK Foreign Secretary: Iran strikes on Gulf 'reckless' - wants 'swift resolution'
latest_news.text: UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper calls Iran's Gulf strikes 'reckless', says UK wants 'swift resolution' and regional stability. Reiterates UK will offer defensive support but 'will not be drawn into wider conflict.'

latest_news.headline: Trump: Strait of Hormuz must be protected 'by other nations who use it'
latest_news.text: Trump says Hormuz protection should fall on 'other nations who use it' - further evidence of US disengagement from coalition-building for Hormuz. Pushes burden to Asian/European importers.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 74% (up). Day 23 Hour 01 UTC - IMMINENT. Central Beirut strikes continue. 1,000+ Lebanese killed. Litani operations ongoing. 12 medical workers killed. Hezbollah ground resistance holding. Updated 2026-03-22T01:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 00 UTC - DETERRENT. No new incidents. 3 Patriot batteries at Incirlik. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T00:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 4% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 00 UTC - DETERRENT. No new developments. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T00:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 15% (up). Day 23 Hour 01 UTC - ELEVATED. Putin: Iran 'loyal friend'. Russia sharing intel. No new NATO-Russia incidents. Updated 2026-03-22T01:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 00 UTC - DETERRENT. Taiwan Strait stable. US-China trade talks in progress. No new PLA activity. Updated 2026-03-22T00:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 00 UTC - DETERRENT. Quiet since 10-missile salvo Mar 14. No new provocations. Updated 2026-03-22T00:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 43% (up). Day 23 Hour 01 UTC - CRITICAL. Deadliest day 2026 (1,610 KIA). Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Spring-Summer offensive prep intensifying. Moscow drone swarms. Updated 2026-03-22T01:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Putin's forces suffer DEADLIEST day of 2026 - 1,610 killed in 24h
latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,610 killed in past 24 hours. Total Russian casualties since Feb 2022 now approximately 1,285,700. Fighting intense despite peace talk pauses.

latest_news.headline: Ukrainian drone swarms target Moscow overnight
latest_news.text: Swarms of Ukrainian drones targeted Moscow overnight, mayor confirms. Russian air defense intercepted attacks. Continued deep-strike capability demonstration.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 30% (stable). Day 23 Hour 01 UTC - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24. TTP also truce. Post-Eid resumption feared Mar 25. No fighting reported. Updated 2026-03-22T01:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM: 'If Iran doesn't FULLY OPEN Strait of Hormuz within 48 HOURS, US will obliterate POWER PLANTS'
Saudi Arabia expels Iran military attache + 4 staff after Yanbu drone strike
Natanz nuclear facility STRUCK by US/Israel - Iran retaliates by striking Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant
Israeli interceptors FAILED - Iranian missiles hit Dimona (8mi from nuclear center) and Arad, 22+ injured
Israel Katz: strikes on Iran will 'intensify significantly' next week
Iran fires 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia (US/UK base, Indian Ocean) - unsuccessful
IDF strikes ballistic missile production factory in Tehran
Iran FM rejects dialogue with US
20+ nations ready to contribute to Hormuz safe passage
Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire to Mar 24 - post-Eid resumption feared
Deadliest day 2026 in Ukraine: 1,610 Russian KIA
Lebanon PM rebukes Iran after IRGC claimed joint Hezbollah strike

new: CENTCOM: 8,000+ targets struck, 130 Iranian vessels destroyed
US shifts to Apache/A-10 close air support - degraded Iranian air defense
3,000+ vessels stranded at Strait of Hormuz (IMO)
Reuters: Iran war 'escalating beyond Trump's control'
Iran fires 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia - one fails, one shot down
Natanz nuclear facility struck - Israel denies attack
Oil sanctions temporarily lifted on Iranian oil at sea
Iran allows Japanese ships Hormuz - bilateral passage deals
Trump: US considering 'winding down' Iran military operations
Russia preparing Spring-Summer 2026 offensive - intensifying mechanized assaults
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 18. DE-ESCALATION: Trump rhetoric winding down. Treasury lifts oil sanctions. Iran allows Japanese ships Hormuz. IAEA confirms no radiation at Natanz. Eid ceasefire Pakistan-Afghanistan. ESCALATION: 8000+ targets struck per CENTCOM. Iran fires at Diego Garcia (2370 miles from Iran). IRGC massive strikes UAE/Kuwait air bases. USS Boxer Marines deploying. 12 medical workers killed in Lebanon. Central Beirut strike kills 10. Russia preparing Spring-Summer offensive. Brent >$110. NET: War intensifying despite wind-down rhetoric. Iran demonstrates global strike capability.

latest_news.headline: TRUMP: 'If Iran doesn't FULLY OPEN Strait of Hormuz within 48 HOURS, US will obliterate POWER PLANTS'
latest_news.text: Trump posts on Truth Social at 00:53 CET: 'If Iran doesn't FULLY OPEN, WITHOUT THREAT, the Strait of Hormuz, within 48 HOURS from this exact point in time, the United States of America will hit and obliterate their various POWER PLANTS, STARTING WITH THE BIGGEST ONE FIRST!' Deadline ~00:53 CET March 24.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia expels Iran military attache and 4 diplomatic staff
latest_news.text: Saudi Arabia expels Iran's military attache, his deputy, and 3 additional staff. All 5 declared persona non grata, 24 hours to leave. Triggered by Iranian drone strike on Yanbu oil port.

latest_news.headline: US and Israel strike Natanz nuclear facility - Iran confirms, no radiation leak
latest_news.source: Iran Atomic Org / Hindu / Times Now
latest_news.text: US-Israeli strikes hit Iran's Natanz nuclear enrichment facility. Iran atomic energy org confirms strike but says 'no leakage of radioactive materials.' Iran claims retaliation was missile strikes on Dimona and Bushehr.

latest_news.headline: Iran retaliates for Natanz by striking Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant
latest_news.text: Iran claims Dimona missile strikes were retaliation after 'US and Israel attacked the Bushehr power plant and the Natanz facilities.' Tasnim: 'No area is safe from Iranian missiles.'

latest_news.headline: Israel Katz: strikes on Iran will 'intensify significantly' next week
latest_news.text: Defense Minister Israel Katz announces strikes on Iran will 'intensify significantly' next week. Contradicts Trump wind-down rhetoric.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 23, 01:04 UTC) - 4th week. CRITICAL: Trump 48-hour ultimatum to obliterate Iranian power plants if Hormuz not opened (deadline ~00:53 CET Mar 24). 64 hospitalized in Arad from Iranian missile strike. Dimona intercept FAILED. 70th wave of Iranian attacks. Bahrain: 143 missiles intercepted. Kuwait refinery burning. Israel chief of staff: 'war not close to ending'. IAEA: no radiation at Natanz. 1,444+ Iranian dead.
de_escalation_watch: Day 23 Hour 01. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric Mar 20. 20+ nations Hormuz safe passage. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA confirms no radiation at Natanz. ESCALATION: TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM (deadline ~00:53 CET Mar 24): obliterate power plants. Saudi expels Iran diplomats. Natanz + Bushehr nuclear sites STRUCK. Dimona/Arad hit - interceptors FAILED. Iran fired 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia. 70th wave attacks. Israel Katz: strikes 'intensify significantly'. Israel chief of staff: 'war not close to ending'. NET: ULTIMATUM DEADLINE ~23hrs away. De-escalation rhetoric OVERTAKEN by escalation. War entering most dangerous phase.
